payload.answer: Admin SQL is in select-only mode for memory_cards: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 is allowed, and DELETE FROM memory_cards is denied.

memory_cards.statement: Admin SQL select-only mode allows SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 and denies DELETE FROM memory_cards.

repair_options: If a write/delete action is needed, switch out of select-only mode or use a permitted administrative path.
If the intent is to inspect records, use SELECT-only queries such as SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10.
